title: Log API Payloads for Metric Dictionary and Dashboard Widget Generation
description: Adds logging of the JSON POST bodies sent to the first and second API endpoints during the Metric Wizard flow. Payloads are stored in the DTP_METRIC_API_RESPONSES table for debugging and auditing.
acceptance_criteria: First API payload is logged in the payload_first_api column
Second API payload is logged in the payload_second_api column
Payloads are stored in the MetricApiResponse model
middleware_changes: Logging interceptor stores request payloads before sending to external APIs.
data_model_changes: Two new columns on MetricApiResponse: payload_first_api and payload_second_api for storing JSON request bodies.
implementation_notes: Migration adds payload_first_api and payload_second_api fields to the dtp_metric_api_responses table.
comment_summary: Developer added the fields and logging. Pushed to staging for review.
